zh.lifeSummary: 當Vrouwe Marie van Landas Vrouwe van Sainghin-en- Mélant於1280年出生在法國豪-德-福朗斯諾爾德艾斯斯時，她的父親Heer Johan van Landes Heer van  Sainghin-en- Mélantoi20歲，母親Johanna van Fiennes15歲。她和Jean IV de Lens至少有1個兒子和1個女兒。她去世於1355年在法國豪-德-福朗斯帕-德-卡拉斯布利享年75歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Vrouwe Marie van Landas Vrouwe van Sainghin-en- Mélant于1280年出生在法国豪-德-福朗斯諾爾德艾斯斯时，她的父亲Heer Johan van Landes Heer van  Sainghin-en- Mélantoi20岁，母亲Johanna van Fiennes15岁。她和Jean IV de Lens至少有1个儿子和1个女儿。她去世于1355年在法国豪-德-福朗斯帕-德-卡拉斯布利享年75岁。

nameMeanings.name: van
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Anh, Thanh, Hung, Minh, Vinh, Dung, Hue, Huong, Lan, Quang, Tan, Thuy, Hong, Chi, Hang, Ho, Pok, Sang, Bai, Chin, Ching, Chu, Chuan, Dong.
Vietnamese (Vạn): from the Chinese surname 萬, see Wan 1.
Vietnamese (Văn): from the Chinese surnames 文 or 聞, see Wen 2 and 3, and also 5 below.

variants.name: Wan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Hong, Yi, Qi, Qiang, Wai, Yiu, Yuk, Chien-Min, Fang, Hin, Jichun, Li, Man, Chung, Min, Yiping, Pak, Sik, Sung Man.  Vietnamese Tin, Bang, Da, Hien, Hoi, Lan, Minh Quang, Sau, Tich, Tung, Yaping, Yuet.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 萬, which means ‘ten thousand’ literally or ‘very great number’ figuratively: (i) from the personal name of Bi Wan (畢萬), an official in the state of Jin (located in present-day Shanxi province). He was said to be a descendant of Bi Gong Gao (known as Duke of Bi), the 15th son of the virtuous King Wen of Zhou (reined 1152–1056  BC ). Bi Wan was later granted the fiefdom of Wei (魏), which in 403  BC  became the state of Wei (located in present-day Shanxi, Shaanxi, Henan and Hebei provinces). Some of his descendants adopted Wei (魏) as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his personal name, as their surname. (ii) from the personal name Wan (萬), style name of Rui Bo (芮伯, the Earl of Rui), an official of the Western Zhou dynasty (1046–771  BC ), who was granted the fief Rui (located in Ruicheng in Shaanxi province). Some of his descendants inherited Rui (芮), the name of the fief, as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his style name, as their surname. (iii) from the placename Wan (萬), the name of a fief (located in Juxian in Shandong province) granted during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ) to an official in the ancient state of Chu. (iv) from the first element of the name of the Wan Si (萬俟) family, who lived in the downstream areas of the Yellow River during the Northern Qi dynasty (550–577  AD ). (v) from the second element of the name of the Tu Wan (吐萬) family, who are members of the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 完, meaning ‘complete’ in Chinese: (i) said to be borne by the descendants of Huan Zhui, a grandson of the Duke Huan of Song (ruler of the state of Song, died 651  BC ). (ii) from Wan (完), the name of Qu Wan (屈完), an official in the state of Chu during the Spring and Autumn Period (770–476  BC ). (iii) shortened form of the compound surname Wan-Yan (完顔), a surname from minority ethnic groups such as Juchen ethnic group in ancient northern China.

nameMeanings.name: Landas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant of   Laney   2.

variants.name: Laney
meanings: Irish: probably a shortened and altered form of   McElhinney  .

English and Irish: habitational name introduced by the Normans originally deriving from any of the many places in northern France called L'Aunai (from Latin alnetum ‘alder grove’). It may also have developed to Delaney .
Variant of   Laine   2, a surname of French origin.

Some of his descendants adopted Wei (魏) as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his personal name, as their surname. nameMeanings.name: Mélant
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Nils, Erik, Nels, Selmer, Thor.

Norwegian: habitational name from any of numerous farmsteads mostly in southwestern Norway so named from Old Norse Methalland ‘the mid land’. In North America, this surname may also be an altered form of the variant Mæland (compare Maland ).

variants.name: Maland
meanings: Norwegian (Måland): habitational name from a farm name composed of Old Norse mór ‘moor, heath’ + land ‘(piece of) land, farmstead’.
Americanized form of Norwegian Mæland (see Meland ).
English (Staffordshire): variant of   Mayland  .

variants.name: Melland
meanings: Norwegian: variant of   Meland  .
English (Derbyshire and Lancashire): variant of   Mayland  .

nameMeanings.name: Marie
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of Maria . When first introduced to England in the Middle Ages, it was Anglicized in pronunciation and respelled Mary . This French form was reintroduced into the English-speaking world as a separate name in the 19th century, and is still pronounced more or less in the French manner, although sometimes with the stress on the first syllable. It is now often used in combination with other names such as Ellie, Chloe, and Lisa.

en.lifeSummary: When Vrouwe Marie van Landas Vrouwe van Sainghin-en- Mélant was born in 1280, in Esnes, Nord, Hauts-de-France, France, her father, Heer Johan van Landes Heer van  Sainghin-en- Mélantoi, was 20 and her mother, Johanna van Fiennes, was 15. She had at least 1 son and 1 daughter with Jean IV de Lens. She died in 1355, in Brimeux, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, France, at the age of 75.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Vrouwe Marie van Landas Vrouwe van Sainghin-en- Mélant est née en 1280, à Esnes, Nord, Hauts-de-France, France, son père, Heer Johan van Landes Heer van  Sainghin-en- Mélantoi, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Johanna van Fiennes, avait 15 ans. Elle a eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille avec Jean IV de Lens. Elle est décédée en 1355, à Brimeux, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, France, à l’âge de 75 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Vrouwe Marie van Landas Vrouwe van Sainghin-en- Mélant 1280 in Esnes, Nord, Hauts-de-France, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Heer Johan van Landes Heer van  Sainghin-en- Mélantoi 20 und ihre Mutter Johanna van Fiennes 15. Sie hatte mit Jean IV de Lens mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1355 im Alter von 75 Jahren in Brimeux, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Vrouwe Marie van Landas Vrouwe van Sainghin-en- Mélant è nata il nel 1280 nel Esnes, Nord, Hauts-de-France, Francia, sua padre, Heer Johan van Landes Heer van  Sainghin-en- Mélantoi, aveva 20 anni e sua madre, Johanna van Fiennes, aveva 15 anni. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia con Jean IV de Lens. Morì nel 1355, nel Brimeux, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Francia, all'età di 75 anni.

ja.Brimeux, Montreuil, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts: フランスハウトス-デ-フランスプアス-デ-カレイスブリメウックス

ja.Villeparisis, Seine-et-Marne, Île-de-Fra: フランスセアイネ-エト-マルンヴィレパーイシス
ja.lifeSummary: Vrouwe Marie van Landas Vrouwe van Sainghin-en- Mélantが1280年にフランスハウトス-デ-フランスノードエスンスで生まれた時，父Heer Johan van Landes Heer van  Sainghin-en- Mélantoiは20歳，母Johanna van Fiennesは15歳であった。彼女はJean IV de Lensとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1355年にフランスハウトス-デ-フランスプアス-デ-カレイスブリメウックスで75歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Vrouwe Marie van Landas Vrouwe van Sainghin-en- Mélant(이)가 1280년 프랑스 하츠-데-프랜스 노르드 스네스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Heer Johan van Landes Heer van  Sainghin-en- Mélantoi(은)는 20세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Johanna van Fiennes(은)는 15세였다. 그녀는 Jean IV de Lens(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1355년 프랑스 하츠-데-프랜스 파스-데-캘레이 브라임우스에서 75세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Vrouwe Marie van Landas Vrouwe van Sainghin-en- Mélant nasceu em 1280, em Esnes, Nord, Hauts-de-France, França, seu pai, Heer Johan van Landes Heer van  Sainghin-en- Mélantoi, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Johanna van Fiennes, tinha 15 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha com Jean IV de Lens. Ela faleceu em 1355, em Brimeux, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, França, com 75 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Vrouwe Marie van Landas Vrouwe van Sainghin-en- Mélant родилась в 1280 г. в местности эснесь, норд, хауц-де-фрэнс, Франция, её отцу по имени Heer Johan van Landes Heer van  Sainghin-en- Mélantoi было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Johanna van Fiennes, 15. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь от Jean IV de Lens. Она умерла в 1355 г. в местности бримеукс, пас-де-калеи, хауц-де-фрэнс, Франция в возрасте 75 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Vrouwe Marie van Landas Vrouwe van Sainghin-en- Mélant nació en 1280, en Esnes, Nord, Hauts-de-France, Francia, su papá, Heer Johan van Landes Heer van  Sainghin-en- Mélantoi, tenía 20 años y su mamá, Johanna van Fiennes, tenía 15 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija con Jean IV de Lens. Murió en 1355, en Brimeux, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Francia, a la edad de 75 años.
